title: Premium Youth-Culture Editorial Poster
sourceTitle: Memory Core Giant Movie Ticket Youth Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium 9:16 memory-core youth-culture editorial poster centered on giant vertical concert admission ticket. Subject: giant vertical concert admission ticket stretches vertically through the composition and feels like admission to an entire chapter of life, printed with favorite songs, cities visited, friendship moments, late-night photos, personal wins. Scene: Electric blue and bright orange background with ticket perforations, stamps, doodles, handwritten notes, barcode elements, paper textures, and highly shareable Pinterest aesthetic. Composition: Centered vertical ticket hero with ONE HELL OF A SHOW integrated into the ticket design, layered personal details, paper texture, clear poster hierarchy, and editorial negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved memory core giant movie ticket youth editorial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Memory-core storytelling, premium youth-culture editorial poster design, high-shareability Pinterest aesthetic, crisp ticket realism, graphic paper collage, and 8K masterpiece finish. Color Palette: Electric blue, bright orange, paper-ticket cream, black barcode marks, stamp reds, handwritten ink, and bright youth-culture contrast. Lighting: Clean poster lighting with visible ticket paper texture, crisp typography, subtle shadow layering, and vivid background contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
